calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; Supporting Declaration; Application For Court Judgment; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Kipper Clothiers, LLC dba Kipper Clothiers, and Erin Berg.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Thomas R. Mulally, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ELAVON, Inc.
Darrell Watson, Paralegal and Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Mulally and Watson appeared via ZOOM for today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Kipper Clothiers, LLC, dba Kipper Clothiers, or Erin Berg.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Breach of Guaranty was filed on July 15, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on August 31, 2020, and was effectuated September 10, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on October 19, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 5, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff ELAVON, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Kipper Clothiers, LLC, dba Kipper Clothiers, and Erin Berg, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,190.97.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,493.64.
Attorney Fees - $1,250.00.
Costs - $686.90.

Total - $43,621.51.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
